# Sri Selva Vinayakar Koyil — Ganesha Temple Brisbane

> A traditional Hindu Ganesha temple serving the South-East Queensland community since 5 February 1995. Located on 4.5 acres beside the Logan River, 35 km south of Brisbane.

## About
- Full name: Sri Selva Vinayakar Koyil (SSVK)
- Tamil name: ஸ்ரீ செல்வ விநாயகர் கோயில்
- Deity: Lord Ganesha (Vinayaka / Ganapathy)
- Consecrated: 5 February 1995
- Location: South Maclean, Queensland, Australia

## Contact
- Address: 4915–4923 Mt Lindesay Highway, South Maclean QLD 4280
- Phone: +61 7 5547 8064
- Email: info@ssvk.org.au
- Website: https://ssvk.naaglabs.workers.dev

## Opening Hours
- Monday to Friday: 7:30 am – 12:00 pm and 5:00 pm – 8:30 pm
- Saturday and Sunday: 7:30 am – 1:00 pm and 5:00 pm – 8:30 pm

## Daily Pooja Times
- Morning Pooja: 9:00 am – 9:30 am
- Evening Pooja: 7:00 pm – 7:30 pm

## Pooja Services
- Archana: $11, approximately 10 minutes
- Abishekam: $75, approximately 45 minutes
- Ganapathy Homam: $251, approximately 90 minutes
- Bookings: call +61 7 5547 8064 or email info@ssvk.org.au

## Canteen
- Open weekends only: Saturday and Sunday, 9:00 am – 2:00 pm
- 100% vegetarian menu
- Dosas, idly, poori, uttapam, snacks, coffee, tea, mango lassi

## Annual Festivals
- Vinayaka Chaturthi (Ganesh Chaturthi): August/September — major festival
- Thai Poosam: January/February
- Panguni Uthiram: March/April
- Aadi Pooram: July/August
- Karthigai Deepam: November/December
- Diwali: October/November
- Monthly Sankatahara Chaturthi: fourth day after full moon
